name: Wine Cooler
recipeIngredient: 5 oz Lemon-lime soft drink (e.g., 7-UP, Sprite, Slice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour wine and lemon-lime soft drink into a glass.
2. Fill with ice cubes, if desired.
3. Serve immediately.
This recipe makes wine coolers similar to those you buy at the store. I typically use an inexpensive wine with strong berry notes.
